mentions.note: Network transformation and AI-driven density optimization expanding margins while growing volumes; successfully completed $5B cost reduction; positioned for $80B premium air freight market; real-time economic signal from 220 countries and 1.5M daily packages.
Spinoff of LTL division incoming Monday under FDXF ticker; Cramer still favors parent company for stability and combined value.
